name: great-counsels
description: Nine counsel personas (RBG, Marshall, Scalia, Lessig, Wu, Brandeis, Sunstein, Arendt, Rawls) plus four operational skills for legal memos, policy memos, ethics reviews, and project initialization. Drafted by great-authors writers via cross-plugin orchestration. Ninth in the Great Minds constellation. The 'should we?' persona set, distinct from the 'can we?' execution plugins. NOT LEGAL ADVICE — a craft register, not a substitute for licensed counsel.
